commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=ab2c0af205a2a8ededde84f51aa85f9278b6d0cd)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes Telegram default text sends, edits, bot reply text, and draft previews from rich raw Bot API calls to standard text send/edit calls with HTML/plain fallback behavior and a 4000-character text cap.

PR surface: Source +125, Tests -48. Total +77 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for source-level review: current main still sends Telegram text, bot replies, and draft previews through rich-message paths, and the linked outage report includes cross-client unsupported-message evidence. I did not run a live Telegram repro in this read-only pass.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blockers are contributor proof, conflict resolution, test alignment, and maintainer confirmation of the Telegram rich-message rollback shape rather than a safe autonomous repair lane.
